name: Easy Crockpot Venison Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the venison into serving size pieces while the meat is still raw.
2. Place the cleaned and washed meat in the crockpot.
3. Sprinkle the meat generously with Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, Season All, and garlic salt.
4. Add the mushroom soup and onion soup mix to the pot. Stir together.
5. Place the onion rings on top of the meat.
6. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
The beauty of this recipe is that it only takes a few minutes to prepare early in the morning and can cook all day while you are away, ready to eat when you get home. Though no water is added, there will be plenty of gravy that can be served over rice or potatoes.
